main_agent_prompt: Execute the user's request directly. Work end-to-end when tools and context allow it. Do not delegate. When you edit files, verify the outcome before you conclude.

presets.name: Default Orchestration
presets.orchestration_prompt: Assess the request, decide whether to answer directly or delegate, and use the listed roles only when they are a better fit than continuing in the coordinator loop. Keep tasks concrete, assign the minimum necessary roles, and drive work to a verified conclusion.
